def solve(m, n, waitCost)
  INF = Float::INFINITY
  dp_even = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, INF) }
  dp_odd = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, INF) }
  
  dp_odd[0][0] = 1
  queue = [[1, 0, 0, 1]]
  
  directions = [[0, 1], [1, 0]]
  
  while queue.any?
    queue.sort!
    current = queue.shift
    cost, i, j, parity = current
    
    if i == m-1 && j == n-1
      return cost
    end
    
    if parity == 1
      if cost > dp_odd[i][j]
        next
      end
      directions.each do |di, dj|
        ni = i + di
        nj = j + dj
        if ni >= 0 && ni < m && nj >= 0 && nj < n
          entry_cost = (ni + 1) * (nj + 1)
          new_cost = cost + entry_cost
          new_parity = 0
          if new_cost < dp_even[ni][nj]
            dp_even[ni][nj] = new_cost
            queue << [new_cost, ni, nj, new_parity]
          end
        end
      end
    else
      if cost > dp_even[i][j]
        next
      end
      wait = waitCost[i][j]
      new_cost = cost + wait
      new_parity = 1
      if new_cost < dp_odd[i][j]
        dp_odd[i][j] = new_cost
        queue << [new_cost, i, j, new_parity]
      end
    end
  end
  INF
end

def solve(m, n, waitCost)
  # Initialize the DP tables
  INF = Float::INFINITY
  dp_even = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, INF) }
  dp_odd = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, INF) }
  
  # Starting point: (0,0) with parity 1 (odd)
  dp_odd[0][0] = 1
  # Priority queue: [cost, i, j, parity]
  queue = [[1, 0, 0, 1]]
  
  # Directions for moving: right (0,1) and down (1,0)
  directions = [[0,1], [1,0]]
  
  while queue.length > 0
    # Sort the queue by cost
    queue.sort!
    current = queue.shift
    cost, i, j, parity = current
    
    # Check if we reached the destination
    if i == m-1 && j == n-1
      return cost
    end
    
    # Check if current cost is higher than the recorded value
    if parity == 1
      # Current parity is odd: must move
      # Check if current cost is higher than dp_odd[i][j]
      if cost > dp_odd[i][j]

      end
      # Try moving right and down
      directions.each do |di, dj|
        ni = i + di
        nj = j + dj
        if ni >= 0 && ni < m && nj >= 0 && nj < n
          entry_cost = (ni + 1) * (nj + 1)

          new_parity = 0

      end
    end
  end
  # If not found (should not happen)

end

def solve(m, n, waitCost)
  # Initialize the DP tables
  INF = Float::INFINITY
  dp_even = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, INF) }
  dp_odd = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, INF) }
  
  # Starting point: (0,0) with parity 1 (odd)
  dp_odd[0][0] = 1
  # Priority queue: [cost, i, j, parity]
  queue = [[1, 0, 0, 1]]
  
  # Directions for moving: right (0,1) and down (1,0)
  directions = [[0,1], [1,0]]
  
  while queue.length > 0
    # Sort the queue by cost
    queue.sort!
    current = queue.shift
    cost, i, j, parity = current
    
    # Check if we reached the destination
    if i == m-1 && j == n-1
      return cost
    end
    
    # Check if current cost is higher than the recorded value
    if parity == 1
      # Current parity is odd: must move
      # Check if current cost is higher than dp_odd[i][j]
      if cost > dp_odd[i][j]
        next
      end
      # Try moving right and down
      directions.each do |di, dj|
        ni = i + di
        nj = j + dj
        if ni >= 0 && ni < m && nj >= 0 && nj < n
          entry_cost = (ni + 1) * (nj + 1)
          new_cost = cost + entry_cost
          new_parity = 0
          # Check if new cost is better than dp_even[ni][nj]
          if new_cost < dp_even[ni][nj]
            dp_even[ni][nj] = new_cost
            queue << [new_cost, ni, nj, new_parity]
          end
        end
      end
    else
      # Current parity is even: must wait
      # Check if current cost is higher than dp_even[i][j]
      if cost > dp_even[i][j]
        next
      end
      # Wait cost is added
      wait = waitCost[i][j]
      new_cost = cost + wait
      new_parity = 1
      # Check if new cost is better than dp_odd[i][j]
      if new_cost < dp_odd[i][j]
        dp_odd[i][j] = new_cost
        queue << [new_cost, i, j, new_parity]
      end
    end
  end
  # If not found (should not happen)
  return INF
end

    # Sort the queue by cost

    current = queue.shift
    cost, i, j, parity = current

def solve(m, n, waitCost)
  # Initialize the DP tables
  INF = Float::INFINITY
  dp_even = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, INF) }
  dp_odd = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, INF) }
  
  # Starting point: (0,0) with parity 1 (odd)
  dp_odd[0][0] = 1
  # Priority queue: [cost, i, j, parity]
  queue = [[1, 0, 0, 1]]
  
  # Directions for moving: right (0,1) and down (1,0)
  directions = [[0,1], [1,0]]
  
  while queue.length > 0
    # Sort the queue by cost
    queue.sort!
    current = queue.shift
    cost, i, j, parity = current
    
    # Check if we reached the destination
    if i == m-1 && j == n-1
      return cost
    end
    
    # Check if current cost is higher than the recorded value
    if parity == 1
      # Current parity is odd: must move
      # Check if current cost is higher than dp_odd[i][j]
      if cost > dp_odd[i][j]
        next
      end
      # Try moving right and down
      directions.each do |di, dj|
        ni = i + di
        nj = j + dj
        if ni >= 0 && ni < m && nj >= 0 && nj < n
          entry_cost = (ni + 1) * (nj + 1)
          new_cost = cost + entry_cost
          new_parity = 0
          # Check if new cost is better than dp_even[ni][nj]
          if new_cost < dp_even[ni][nj]
            dp_even[ni][nj] = new_cost
            queue << [new_cost, ni, nj, new_parity]
          end
        end
      end
    else
      # Current parity is even: must wait
      # Check if current cost is higher than dp_even[i][j]
      if cost > dp_even[i][j]
        next
      end
      # Wait cost is added
      wait = waitCost[i][j]
      new_cost = cost + wait
      new_parity = 1
      # Check if new cost is better than dp_odd[i][j]
      if new_cost < dp_odd[i][j]
        dp_odd[i][j] = new_cost
        queue << [new_cost, i, j, new_parity]
      end
    end
  end
  # If not found (should not happen)
  return INF
end

```ruby
def solve(m, n, waitCost)
  INF = Float::INFINITY
  dp_even = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, INF) }
  dp_odd = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, INF) }
  
  dp_odd[0][0] = 1
  queue = [[1, 0, 0, 1]]
  
  directions = [[0, 1], [1, 0]]
  
  while queue.any?
    queue.sort!
    current = queue.shift
    cost, i, j, parity = current
    
    if i == m-1 && j == n-1
      return cost
    end
    
    if parity == 1
      if cost > dp_odd[i][j]
        next
      end
      directions.each do |di, dj|
        ni = i + di
        nj = j + dj
        if ni >= 0 && ni < m && nj >= 0 && nj < n
          entry_cost = (ni + 1) * (nj + 1)
          new_cost = cost + entry_cost
          new_parity = 0
          if new_cost < dp_even[ni][nj]
            dp_even[ni][nj] = new_cost
            queue << [new_cost, ni, nj, new_parity]
          end
        end
      end
    else
      if cost > dp_even[i][j]
        next
      end
      wait = waitCost[i][j]
      new_cost = cost + wait
      new_parity = 1
      if new_cost < dp_odd[i][j]
        dp_odd[i][j] = new_cost
        queue << [new_cost, i, j, new_parity]
      end
    end
  end
  INF
end
